title: draba incana var. sylvatica
intro: Draba incana var. sylvatica, also known as alpine whitlowgrass, is a plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and supporting immune function. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves can be used fresh or dried for various herbal preparations.
